rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b) has no relation to §11.271, which governs exemptions for offshore drilling equipment and spill response containment systems. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.271. OFFSHORE DRILLING EQUIPMENT NOT IN USE.
_note: Rule text concerns offshore drilling equipment exemptions; proposed change targets residence homestead exemption. No intersection between the two provisions.
